response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ requirement, with strong current alignment to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at re:cinq and Optilyz. Direct AI agent / MCP experience matches a key requirement. Background spans frontend, backend, databases (MongoDB), cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and demonstrates engineering rigor through TDD, CI/CD, and community teaching. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java in recent roles, but the breadth and depth suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with current TypeScript/Node.js/React and AI-agent/MCP work
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Broad polyglot background (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang) plus Docker/Kubernetes and MongoDB
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Limited recent Kotlin/Java usage for the secondary backend services
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate niche tooling preference over mainstream JVM ecosystem
